name: C-13 merge preserves the why_authoritative field from the operator entry per the architecture verbose-justification contract
command:
printf -- '[]' > bundled.yaml && printf -- '- id: custom-framework
  url: https://x.com
  why_authoritative: full justification text per policy
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/merge-registry.sh" --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml --bundled bundled.yaml && grep -q 'full justification text per policy' merged.yaml && echo preserved 1>&2
